TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Saisiyat, story: SaiNr-holiday_kalaeh a _oemaw
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: isahini' kaysa'an 'ita' koSa'en pasan kinolol a.
S.PHON: is~θahiniʔ kajs~θaʔan ʔitaʔ koʃaʔən pas~θan kinolol a.
S.FORM: isahini' kaysa'an 'ita' koSa'en pasan kinolol a.
S.PHON: is~θahiniʔ kajs~θaʔan ʔitaʔ koʃaʔən pas~θan kinolol a.
S.TRANSL: 「今天咱們來聊聊掃墓節的事.」

S.FORM: nimon noka saywalo' nak'ino 'am 'am patabil ka kinolol. ay
S.PHON: nimon noka s~θajwaloʔ nakʔino ʔam ʔam pataβil ka kinolol. aj
S.FORM: nimon noka saywalo' nak'ino 'am 'am patabil ka kinolol. ay
S.PHON: nimon noka s~θajwaloʔ nakʔino ʔam ʔam pataβil ka kinolol. aj
S.TRANSL: 「你們東河的人是怎樣祭祖掃墓呢.」
"How do you pay respects to the dead in Tungho?"

S.FORM: yami hiza so nakhini rimrim'anan o isahini kaysa'an ma hoN.
S.PHON: jami hiz~ða s~θo nakhini rimrimʔanan o is~θahini kajs~θaʔan ma hon.
S.FORM: yami hiza so nakhini rimrim'anan o isahini kaysa'an ma hoN.
S.PHON: jami hiz~ða s~θo nakhini rimrimʔanan o is~θahini kajs~θaʔan ma hon.

S.FORM: hm papahaih minsa'la' hiyahiya minsa'la' So minsa'la' kayzaeh.
S.PHON: hm papahaih mins~θaʔlaʔ hijahija mins~θaʔlaʔ ʃo mins~θaʔlaʔ kajz~ðæh.
S.FORM: hm papahaih minsa'la' hiyahiya minsa'la' So minsa'la' kayzaeh.
S.PHON: hm papahaih mins~θaʔlaʔ hijahija mins~θaʔlaʔ ʃo mins~θaʔlaʔ kajz~ðæh.
S.TRANSL: 「我們那邊如果早上 ... ... 今天呀,看看誰先到,如果最先到的就最好了.」
"Whoever arrives ahead, to arrive ahead is good."

S.FORM: hiya' maybiil atomal o 'angangen nasia koSa'en 'ampowa' kin ma'ngel.
S.PHON: hijaʔ majβiil atomal o ʔaŋaŋən nas~θia koʃaʔən ʔampowaʔ kin maʔŋəl.
S.FORM: hiya' maybiil atomal o 'angangen nasia koSa'en 'ampowa' kin ma'ngel.
S.PHON: hijaʔ majβiil atomal o ʔaŋaŋən nas~θia koʃaʔən ʔampowaʔ kin maʔŋəl.
S.TRANSL: 「誰最晚到,就會被罵說:『為什麼會這麼晚到呢?』」
"Whoever comes last will get a scolding."

S.FORM: nom talboewah isaa nak'isaza.
S.PHON: nom talβœwah is~θaa nakʔis~θaz~ða.
S.FORM: nom talboewah isaa nak'isaza.
S.PHON: nom talβœwah is~θaa nakʔis~θaz~ða.

S.FORM: e So rima' yami ma' hoN potngor ila saboeh.
S.PHON: ə ʃo rimaʔ jami maʔ hon potŋor ila s~θaβœh.
S.FORM: e So rima' yami ma' hoN potngor ila saboeh.
S.PHON: ə ʃo rimaʔ jami maʔ hon potŋor ila s~θaβœh.

TRANSL.notes: 「如果我們也(去掃墓),那們全姓的人就要通通都來.」

S.TRANSL: 「如果我們也 ,那們全姓的人就要通通都來.」
"Every member of the clan should be there."

S.FORM: 'aehae' sinraehoe' potngor ila saboeh isaa ma' sizaeh ila talboewahan kayzaeh ila.
S.PHON: ʔæhæʔ s~θinræhœʔ potŋor ila s~θaβœh is~θaa maʔ s~θiz~ðæh ila talβœwahan kajz~ðæh ila.
S.FORM: 'aehae' sinraehoe' potngor ila saboeh isaa ma' sizaeh ila talboewahan kayzaeh ila.
S.PHON: ʔæhæʔ s~θinræhœʔ potŋor ila s~θaβœh is~θaa maʔ s~θiz~ðæh ila talβœwahan kajz~ðæh ila.
S.TRANSL: 「一個姓的人全部到了,然後砍草的工作都做好了,全部的人就可以吃了.」

TRANSL.notes: "The weeding should have been finished (once all the clans have arrived)."

S.FORM: ai patabir ila patabir so.
S.PHON: ai pataβir ila pataβir s~θo.
S.FORM: ai patabir ila patabir so.
S.PHON: ai pataβir ila pataβir s~θo.

S.FORM: sizaeh ila isaa ma 'a'aynaa' yami too' sinraehoe'.
S.PHON: s~θiz~ðæh ila is~θaa ma ʔaʔajnaaʔ jami tooʔ s~θinræhœʔ.
S.FORM: sizaeh ila isaa ma 'a'aynaa' yami too' sinraehoe'.
S.PHON: s~θiz~ðæh ila is~θaa ma ʔaʔajnaaʔ jami tooʔ s~θinræhœʔ.

TRANSL.notes: 「祭拜完了,然後我們(每一個人)就等三個姓的人通通到齊.」

S.TRANSL: 「祭拜完了,然後我們 就等三個姓的人通通到齊.」

TRANSL.notes: "After we finish (weeding), we wait for the others. There are three clans altogether."

S.TRANSL: "After we finish , we wait for the others. There are three clans altogether."

S.FORM: o m kaybaybaw o babai'.
S.PHON: o m kajβajβaw o βaβaiʔ.
S.FORM: o m kaybaybaw o babai'.
S.PHON: o m kajβajβaw o βaβaiʔ.

TRANSL.notes: 「(等)高姓跟風姓的人(來).」

S.FORM: a sizaeh ila saboeh 'a'aynaa' sizaeh saboeh mwai' ila mwai' o rihani' baala'.
S.PHON: a s~θiz~ðæh ila s~θaβœh ʔaʔajnaaʔ s~θiz~ðæh s~θaβœh mwaiʔ ila mwaiʔ o rihaniʔ βaalaʔ.
S.FORM: a sizaeh ila saboeh 'a'aynaa' sizaeh saboeh mwai' ila mwai' o rihani' baala'.
S.PHON: a s~θiz~ðæh ila s~θaβœh ʔaʔajnaaʔ s~θiz~ðæh s~θaβœh mwaiʔ ila mwaiʔ o rihaniʔ βaalaʔ.

TRANSL.notes: 「(每一個人就地)等全部的人都到齊,來到河邊這兒.」

S.TRANSL: 「 等全部的人都到齊,來到河邊這兒.」
"We wait for everybody. Once everybody has finished, we come to the river."

S.FORM: m maray aleb a.
S.PHON: m maraj aləβ a.
S.FORM: m maray aleb a.
S.PHON: m maraj aləβ a.

S.FORM: a isaa o kaspinatabil hiza tekteken saboeh si'aelen ila risaza.
S.PHON: a is~θaa o kas~θpinataβil hiz~ða təktəkən s~θaβœh s~θiʔælən ila ris~θaz~ða.
S.FORM: a isaa o kaspinatabil hiza tekteken saboeh si'aelen ila risaza.
S.PHON: a is~θaa o kas~θpinataβil hiz~ða təktəkən s~θaβœh s~θiʔælən ila ris~θaz~ða.
S.TRANSL: 「然後把祭品全部剁成一塊一塊,然後吃掉.」
"The food to be offered has to be cut/sliced."

S.FORM: uh paplangeen noka saboeh.
S.PHON: *h paplaŋəən noka s~θaβœh.
S.FORM: uh paplangeen noka saboeh.
S.PHON: *h paplaŋəən noka s~θaβœh.

S.FORM: ehe So sizaeh ila isaa ma' tabin 'amet isa lobih ila.
S.PHON: əhə ʃo s~θiz~ðæh ila is~θaa maʔ taβin ʔamət is~θa loβih ila.
S.FORM: ehe So sizaeh ila isaa ma' tabin 'amet isa lobih ila.
S.PHON: əhə ʃo s~θiz~ðæh ila is~θaa maʔ taβin ʔamət is~θa loβih ila.

S.FORM: a nak kakhayza'an nakhara' wa'wa'isan ra'oe ka pinobaeaeh 'akoy ka pinobaeaeh tabin san o aw'itol ma' isaa.
S.PHON: a nak kakhajz~ðaʔan nakharaʔ waʔwaʔis~θan raʔœ ka pinoβææh ʔakoj ka pinoβææh taβin s~θan o awʔitol maʔ is~θaa.
S.FORM: a nak kakhayza'an nakhara' wa'wa'isan ra'oe ka pinobaeaeh 'akoy ka pinobaeaeh tabin san o aw'itol ma' isaa.
S.PHON: a nak kakhajz~ðaʔan nakharaʔ waʔwaʔis~θan raʔœ ka pinoβææh ʔakoj ka pinoβææh taβin s~θan o awʔitol maʔ is~θaa.
S.TRANSL: 「像以前呀,很多人都很會喝酒;酒有很多,喝到三點左右.」
"People used to be good drinkers and used to drink a lot until around three in the afternoon."

S.FORM: haysia.
S.PHON: hajs~θia.
S.FORM: haysia.
S.PHON: hajs~θia.

TRANSL.notes: 「還在(喝),哈哈.」
'(They were) still (drinking).'

S.FORM: isaa isahini kayzaeh so 'aehae' taew'an 'aehae' kinae'hae'an ma' isaa.
S.PHON: is~θaa is~θahini kajz~ðæh s~θo ʔæhæʔ tæwʔan ʔæhæʔ kinæʔhæʔan maʔ is~θaa.
S.FORM: isaa isahini kayzaeh so 'aehae' taew'an 'aehae' kinae'hae'an ma' isaa.
S.PHON: is~θaa is~θahini kajz~ðæh s~θo ʔæhæʔ tæwʔan ʔæhæʔ kinæʔhæʔan maʔ is~θaa.

TRANSL.notes: 「 ... ... 然後,如果一家(帶)一瓶酒的話,然後 ... ... ,」

S.TRANSL: 「 ... ... 然後,如果一家 一瓶酒的話,然後 ... ... ,」
"Now the situation is much better. So if each household brings one bottle, "

S.FORM: 'al'alak hara ra'oe o wa'wa'isan saboeh.
S.PHON: ʔalʔalak hara raʔœ o waʔwaʔis~θan s~θaβœh.
S.FORM: 'al'alak hara ra'oe o wa'wa'isan saboeh.
S.PHON: ʔalʔalak hara raʔœ o waʔwaʔis~θan s~θaβœh.

TRANSL.notes: 「年輕人這樣喝酒好像(每個人)都很行.」

S.TRANSL: 「年輕人這樣喝酒好像 都很行.」

TRANSL.notes: "The young people were very good drinkers. (There might not be enough wine.)"

S.TRANSL: "The young people were very good drinkers. "

S.FORM: 'oka' ila o ka hiza ka pinatabir taka'ino'on nimon talsasaboehen. ay
S.PHON: ʔokaʔ ila o ka hiz~ða ka pinataβir takaʔinoʔon nimon tals~θas~θaβœhən. aj
S.FORM: 'oka' ila o ka hiza ka pinatabir taka'ino'on nimon talsasaboehen. ay
S.PHON: ʔokaʔ ila o ka hiz~ða ka pinataβir takaʔinoʔon nimon tals~θas~θaβœhən. aj

TRANSL.notes: 「不然的話,那個拜過的東西你們怎麼弄 ... ... (大家一起)享用嗎?」

S.TRANSL: 「不然的話,那個拜過的東西你們怎麼弄 ... ... 享用嗎?」
"Otherwise, what are you going to do with the food but to share them with everybody?"

S.FORM: o ai ma sa'sa'eh ka mae'iyaeh ma' 'iska nonak baiw.
S.PHON: o ai ma s~θaʔs~θaʔəh ka mæʔijæh maʔ ʔis~θka nonak βaiw.
S.FORM: o ai ma sa'sa'eh ka mae'iyaeh ma' 'iska nonak baiw.
S.PHON: o ai ma s~θaʔs~θaʔəh ka mæʔijæh maʔ ʔis~θka nonak βaiw.
S.TRANSL: "Everybody buys his own things to offer."

S.FORM: iska nonak baiw niya'om m 'am 'akoy ma' 'akoy hara.
S.PHON: is~θka nonak βaiw nijaʔom m ʔam ʔakoj maʔ ʔakoj hara.
S.FORM: iska nonak baiw niya'om m 'am 'akoy ma' 'akoy hara.
S.PHON: is~θka nonak βaiw nijaʔom m ʔam ʔakoj maʔ ʔakoj hara.
S.TRANSL: 「我們自己要買多也可以買多,像 ... ... .」
"If you want to buy more you can buy more."

S.FORM: a tata'a 'aeyam hoN.
S.PHON: a tataʔa ʔæjam hon.
S.FORM: a tata'a 'aeyam hoN.
S.PHON: a tataʔa ʔæjam hon.
S.TRANSL: 「雞啊,豬肉呀,還有 ... ... 反正三牲就是啦.」
"Chicken, pork, or anything, as long as there are three kinds."

S.FORM: o hara too' sinraehoe'.
S.PHON: o hara tooʔ s~θinræhœʔ.
S.FORM: o hara too' sinraehoe'.
S.PHON: o hara tooʔ s~θinræhœʔ.

S.FORM: oh o?
S.PHON: oh o?
S.FORM: oh o?
S.PHON: oh o?

S.FORM: oh tintinawbon hara'.
S.PHON: oh tintinawβon haraʔ.
S.FORM: oh tintinawbon hara'.
S.PHON: oh tintinawβon haraʔ.

S.FORM: oh isaa baiw ka isaa sipatabir? si'aelen saboeh.
S.PHON: oh is~θaa βaiw ka is~θaa s~θipataβir? s~θiʔælən s~θaβœh.
S.FORM: oh isaa baiw ka isaa sipatabir? si'aelen saboeh.
S.PHON: oh is~θaa βaiw ka is~θaa s~θipataβir? s~θiʔælən s~θaβœh.
S.TRANSL: 「然後就買那些東西來祭拜,之後就把那些吃光光.」
"You buy the food for offering, and then eat them afterwards."

S.FORM: oh 'okay alibih ray taew'an.
S.PHON: oh ʔokaj aliβih raj tæwʔan.
S.FORM: oh 'okay alibih ray taew'an.
S.PHON: oh ʔokaj aliβih raj tæwʔan.

S.FORM: oh 'oka' i kosa.
S.PHON: oh ʔokaʔ i kos~θa.
S.FORM: oh 'oka' i kosa.
S.PHON: oh ʔokaʔ i kos~θa.

TRANSL.notes: 「沒有說(可以帶回家).」
"Nobody says (you can't take them home)."

S.FORM: a isikil sinraehoe' hiza'.
S.PHON: a is~θikil s~θinræhœʔ hiz~ðaʔ.
S.FORM: a isikil sinraehoe' hiza'.
S.PHON: a is~θikil s~θinræhœʔ hiz~ðaʔ.

S.FORM: i moyo 'aehae' sinraehoe' hiza ma ma ta sisasaboehen no isaa sisabaiw ka isaa ka patabir o.
S.PHON: i mojo ʔæhæʔ s~θinræhœʔ hiz~ða ma ma ta s~θis~θas~θaβœhən no is~θaa s~θis~θaβaiw ka is~θaa ka pataβir o.
S.FORM: i moyo 'aehae' sinraehoe' hiza ma ma ta sisasaboehen no isaa sisabaiw ka isaa ka patabir o.
S.PHON: i mojo ʔæhæʔ s~θinræhœʔ hiz~ða ma ma ta s~θis~θas~θaβœhən no is~θaa s~θis~θaβaiw ka is~θaa ka pataβir o.
S.TRANSL: 「你們那邊一個姓的人替其他人買祭品給大家.」
"One clan helps buy the things needed for everybody"

W.TRANSL: 指焦-重疊-大家一起-受焦

S.FORM: 'oka' yami 'okay saseme ka rayhil.
S.PHON: ʔokaʔ jami ʔokaj s~θas~θəmə ka rajhil.
S.FORM: 'oka' yami 'okay saseme ka rayhil.
S.PHON: ʔokaʔ jami ʔokaj s~θas~θəmə ka rajhil.

S.FORM: m sason ray a a pasbaki' nara ka rayhil sisiroton hiza pasankinolol nonak baiw koza'.
S.PHON: m s~θas~θon raj a a pas~θβakiʔ nara ka rajhil s~θis~θiroton hiz~ða pas~θankinolol nonak βaiw koz~ðaʔ.
S.FORM: m sason ray a a pasbaki' nara ka rayhil sisiroton hiza pasankinolol nonak baiw koza'.
S.PHON: m s~θas~θon raj a a pas~θβakiʔ nara ka rajhil s~θis~θiroton hiz~ða pas~θankinolol nonak βaiw koz~ðaʔ.

TRANSL.notes: 「在那裡 ... ... 啊 ... ... 祖靈祭的話錢就蒐集在一起;那個是掃墓節,自己買多少(就多少).」

S.TRANSL: 「在那裡 ... ... 啊 ... ... 祖靈祭的話錢就蒐集在一起;那個是掃墓節,自己買多少 .」
"We contribute money for the pasbaki celebration. But we buy for our own on tombsweeping."

S.FORM: m arasen sipatabir.
S.PHON: m aras~θən s~θipataβir.
S.FORM: m arasen sipatabir.
S.PHON: m aras~θən s~θipataβir.

S.FORM: lobih isaa.
S.PHON: loβih is~θaa.
S.FORM: lobih isaa.
S.PHON: loβih is~θaa.

S.FORM: sia si'aelen saboeh.
S.PHON: s~θia s~θiʔælən s~θaβœh.
S.FORM: sia si'aelen saboeh.
S.PHON: s~θia s~θiʔælən s~θaβœh.

S.FORM: a XXXX 'okay alibih ka ray taew'an.
S.PHON: a **** ʔokaj aliβih ka raj tæwʔan.
S.FORM: a XXXX 'okay alibih ka ray taew'an.
S.PHON: a **** ʔokaj aliβih ka raj tæwʔan.

TRANSL.notes: 「沒有(把祭品)帶回家裡.」

S.FORM: uhN hiya' malibih ma' isaa itayso'on.
S.PHON: *hn hijaʔ maliβih maʔ is~θaa itajs~θoʔon.
S.FORM: uhN hiya' malibih ma' isaa itayso'on.
S.PHON: *hn hijaʔ maliβih maʔ is~θaa itajs~θoʔon.

TRANSL.notes: 「如果有誰(把祭品)帶回家,(我們)也不會管.」

S.TRANSL: 「如果有誰 帶回家, 也不會管.」
"We don't care if somebody takes them home."

S.FORM: So 'am malibih ka alibih o isaa.
S.PHON: ʃo ʔam maliβih ka aliβih o is~θaa.
S.FORM: So 'am malibih ka alibih o isaa.
S.PHON: ʃo ʔam maliβih ka aliβih o is~θaa.

TRANSL.notes: 「如果要帶回去家裡,也可以(讓他們)帶回家裡.」

S.TRANSL: 「如果要帶回去家裡,也可以 帶回家裡.」
"What needs to be taken home should be taken home."

S.FORM: ai eh noka 'inaz'azema komoSa sia ila hiza marke.
S.PHON: ai əh noka ʔinaz~ðʔaz~ðəma komoʃa s~θia ila hiz~ða markə.
S.FORM: ai eh noka 'inaz'azema komoSa sia ila hiza marke.
S.PHON: ai əh noka ʔinaz~ðʔaz~ðəma komoʃa s~θia ila hiz~ða markə.

TRANSL.notes: 「(我們)心裡就會想說:『他是個吝嗇鬼.』」

S.TRANSL: 「 心裡就會想說:『他是個吝嗇鬼.』」

TRANSL.notes: "(We know) he's a miser."

S.FORM: niyaom rini raremewan kosa yami paspaso sinraehoe'.
S.PHON: nijaom rini rarəməwan kos~θa jami pas~θpas~θo s~θinræhœʔ.
S.FORM: niyaom rini raremewan kosa yami paspaso sinraehoe'.
S.PHON: nijaom rini rarəməwan kos~θa jami pas~θpas~θo s~θinræhœʔ.
S.TRANSL: 「我們向天湖這兒是 ... ... 我們每個姓的人呀 ... ... .」
"Here in Xiangtianhu, each clan buys their own things for offering."

S.FORM: ah' o too' sinraehoe' hini rini raremewan.
S.PHON: ahʔ o tooʔ s~θinræhœʔ hini rini rarəməwan.
S.FORM: ah' o too' sinraehoe' hini rini raremewan.
S.PHON: ahʔ o tooʔ s~θinræhœʔ hini rini rarəməwan.
S.TRANSL: "There are three clans here in Xiangtianhu."

S.FORM: noka sayna'ase lasia ma' isaa lasia nonak maksasome baiw.
S.PHON: noka s~θajnaʔas~θə las~θia maʔ is~θaa las~θia nonak maks~θas~θomə βaiw.
S.FORM: noka sayna'ase lasia ma' isaa lasia nonak maksasome baiw.
S.PHON: noka s~θajnaʔas~θə las~θia maʔ is~θaa las~θia nonak maks~θas~θomə βaiw.
S.TRANSL: 「然後芎姓他們 ... ... 他們自己捐錢來買東西.」
"The Sayna'ases contribute money to buy the things they need."

S.FORM: XXXX ai titiyon mwai' kanyami.
S.PHON: **** ai titijon mwaiʔ kanjami.
S.FORM: XXXX ai titiyon mwai' kanyami.
S.PHON: **** ai titijon mwaiʔ kanjami.

S.FORM: sememel ka rayhil 'oyae baiw.
S.PHON: s~θəməməl ka rajhil ʔojæ βaiw.
S.FORM: sememel ka rayhil 'oyae baiw.
S.PHON: s~θəməməl ka rajhil ʔojæ βaiw.

TRANSL.notes: 「我們朱家捐錢(給他們),也一起買東西.」

S.TRANSL: 「我們朱家捐錢 ,也一起買東西.」
"We Titiuns also contribute money and buy the things together."

S.FORM: a tilsa saboeh.
S.PHON: a tils~θa s~θaβœh.
S.FORM: a tilsa saboeh.
S.PHON: a tils~θa s~θaβœh.

TRANSL.notes: 「一塊兒(買).」

S.FORM: 'aehae' anoka babai' ma' nak'isaa 'oyae.
S.PHON: ʔæhæʔ anoka βaβaiʔ maʔ nakʔis~θaa ʔojæ.
S.FORM: 'aehae' anoka babai' ma' nak'isaa 'oyae.
S.PHON: ʔæhæʔ anoka βaβaiʔ maʔ nakʔis~θaa ʔojæ.

S.FORM: nak isaa o.
S.PHON: nak is~θaa o.
S.FORM: nak isaa o.
S.PHON: nak is~θaa o.

S.FORM: a isaso nak kaysa'an hara ma So hiya' pinabilis ka rayhil ma' isaa isaa rima' baiw ka.
S.PHON: a is~θas~θo nak kajs~θaʔan hara ma ʃo hijaʔ pinaβilis~θ ka rajhil maʔ is~θaa is~θaa rimaʔ βaiw ka.
S.FORM: a isaso nak kaysa'an hara ma So hiya' pinabilis ka rayhil ma' isaa isaa rima' baiw ka.
S.PHON: a is~θas~θo nak kajs~θaʔan hara ma ʃo hijaʔ pinaβilis~θ ka rajhil maʔ is~θaa is~θaa rimaʔ βaiw ka.

TRANSL.notes: 「像 ... ... 像今天 ... ... 誰負責這筆錢,就(負責)去買東西.」

S.TRANSL: 「像 ... ... 像今天 ... ... 誰負責這筆錢,就 去買東西.」
"The person in charge of the money has to buy the things."

S.FORM: o a hiza isaa nak niya'om noka titiyon zeh hisia kama hao la makbowa kil iro ewon lasia too' kama rima' baiw.
S.PHON: o a hiz~ða is~θaa nak nijaʔom noka titijon z~ðəh his~θia kama hao la makβowa kil iro əwon las~θia tooʔ kama rimaʔ βaiw.
S.FORM: o a hiza isaa nak niya'om noka titiyon zeh hisia kama hao la makbowa kil iro ewon lasia too' kama rima' baiw.
S.PHON: o a hiz~ða is~θaa nak nijaʔom noka titijon z~ðəh his~θia kama hao la makβowa kil iro əwon las~θia tooʔ kama rimaʔ βaiw.
S.TRANSL: 「像我們朱家是 ... .恩 ... .Bowa叔叔跟Iro還有Ewon他們三個專門負責去買東西.」
"In our Tition clan, the persons in charge of buying the things are Uncle Makbowa, Iro:, and Ewo:n."

S.FORM: ai a So baiwin ma' isaa baiwin mwai' arasen ila rini raremewan.
S.PHON: ai a ʃo βaiwin maʔ is~θaa βaiwin mwaiʔ aras~θən ila rini rarəməwan.
S.FORM: ai a So baiwin ma' isaa baiwin mwai' arasen ila rini raremewan.
S.PHON: ai a ʃo βaiwin maʔ is~θaa βaiwin mwaiʔ aras~θən ila rini rarəməwan.
S.TRANSL: 「買到了然後就帶到向天湖這裡.」
"After buying the things, they take them here to Xiangtianhu."

S.FORM: yami' hini ka kama talek ka 'aeyam ka tinawbon hara ka katawbonon.
S.PHON: jamiʔ hini ka kama talək ka ʔæjam ka tinawβon hara ka katawβonon.
S.FORM: yami' hini ka kama talek ka 'aeyam ka tinawbon hara ka katawbonon.
S.PHON: jamiʔ hini ka kama talək ka ʔæjam ka tinawβon hara ka katawβonon.
S.TRANSL: 「我們這裡負責煮豬肉和糯米糕.」
"We here take care of cooking the meat and the rice-cakes."

S.FORM: isaso kaspatabir 'arasen ray taew'an rini si'aelen ray'isaso ray kakololan.
S.PHON: is~θas~θo kas~θpataβir ʔaras~θən raj tæwʔan rini s~θiʔælən rajʔis~θas~θo raj kakololan.
S.FORM: isaso kaspatabir 'arasen ray taew'an rini si'aelen ray'isaso ray kakololan.
S.PHON: is~θas~θo kas~θpataβir ʔaras~θən raj tæwʔan rini s~θiʔælən rajʔis~θas~θo raj kakololan.
S.TRANSL: 「把祭拜過的東西帶到家裡吃,還是在墓園那裡吃?」
"Do you take the food offerings home, or eat them there at the graveyard?"

S.FORM: 'oka' a risaso ri.
S.PHON: ʔokaʔ a ris~θas~θo ri.
S.FORM: 'oka' a risaso ri.
S.PHON: ʔokaʔ a ris~θas~θo ri.

TRANSL.notes: 「沒有.(我們在)那裡(吃).」
"No. (We eat them) there."

S.FORM: ray kinkinololan zi'saza ma sipaplangi anoka saboeh.
S.PHON: raj kinkinololan z~ðiʔs~θaz~ða ma s~θipaplaŋi anoka s~θaβœh.
S.FORM: ray kinkinololan zi'saza ma sipaplangi anoka saboeh.
S.PHON: raj kinkinololan z~ðiʔs~θaz~ða ma s~θipaplaŋi anoka s~θaβœh.
S.TRANSL: 「大家把食物帶到舊墓那裡一起吃.」
"Everybody takes the food to the graveyard where we gather to eat."

S.FORM: e pa'apol ri'saza so hiya koSa.
S.PHON: ə paʔapol riʔs~θaz~ða s~θo hija koʃa.
S.FORM: e pa'apol ri'saza so hiya koSa.
S.PHON: ə paʔapol riʔs~θaz~ða s~θo hija koʃa.

S.FORM: 'okay 'ameti ma' isaa alibihin isaa so.
S.PHON: ʔokaj ʔaməti maʔ is~θaa aliβihin is~θaa s~θo.
S.FORM: 'okay 'ameti ma' isaa alibihin isaa so.
S.PHON: ʔokaj ʔaməti maʔ is~θaa aliβihin is~θaa s~θo.

S.FORM: hiya' nihiya' 'ameten ma' isaa.
S.PHON: hijaʔ nihijaʔ ʔamətən maʔ is~θaa.
S.FORM: hiya' nihiya' 'ameten ma' isaa.
S.PHON: hijaʔ nihijaʔ ʔamətən maʔ is~θaa.

TRANSL.notes: 「吃完(是最好).」
"(It is good) if one's food is entirely consumed."

S.TRANSL: " if one's food is entirely consumed."

S.FORM: ma 'ameten hiza haysani ila sa' isaa.
S.PHON: ma ʔamətən hiz~ða hajs~θani ila s~θaʔ is~θaa.
S.FORM: ma 'ameten hiza haysani ila sa' isaa.
S.PHON: ma ʔamətən hiz~ða hajs~θani ila s~θaʔ is~θaa.

S.FORM: 'a'akoy ila ka 'ae'aewhaey so rima' pabaiwin.
S.PHON: ʔaʔakoj ila ka ʔæʔæwhæj s~θo rimaʔ paβaiwin.
S.FORM: 'a'akoy ila ka 'ae'aewhaey so rima' pabaiwin.
S.PHON: ʔaʔakoj ila ka ʔæʔæwhæj s~θo rimaʔ paβaiwin.
S.TRANSL: "It's not good to buy too much meat."

S.FORM: aeyam hayza o lampez tintin sam'iyaeh tintin hini'.
S.PHON: æjam hajz~ða o lampəz~ð tintin s~θamʔijæh tintin hiniʔ.
S.FORM: aeyam hayza o lampez tintin sam'iyaeh tintin hini'.
S.PHON: æjam hajz~ða o lampəz~ð tintin s~θamʔijæh tintin hiniʔ.
S.TRANSL: 「如果買個十斤二十斤的豬肉.」
"If you need to buy meat, there will be around ten to twenty kilos."

S.FORM: hini 'aehae' so kik haebaeaen ka mae'iyaeh mwai' isaa pa'apolon hini 'am ino'an nanaw poa'aw 'am amet.
S.PHON: hini ʔæhæʔ s~θo kik hæβææn ka mæʔijæh mwaiʔ is~θaa paʔapolon hini ʔam inoʔan nanaw poaʔaw ʔam amət.
S.FORM: hini 'aehae' so kik haebaeaen ka mae'iyaeh mwai' isaa pa'apolon hini 'am ino'an nanaw poa'aw 'am amet.
S.PHON: hini ʔæhæʔ s~θo kik hæβææn ka mæʔijæh mwaiʔ is~θaa paʔapolon hini ʔam inoʔan nanaw poaʔaw ʔam amət.
S.TRANSL: 「如果沒有太多人來,那如何吃完所有的東西呢?」
"How could you consume everything if you buy too much food?"

S.FORM: isaa ma' isaa' alibihin ray taew'an.
S.PHON: is~θaa maʔ is~θaaʔ aliβihin raj tæwʔan.
S.FORM: isaa ma' isaa' alibihin ray taew'an.
S.PHON: is~θaa maʔ is~θaaʔ aliβihin raj tæwʔan.

S.FORM: ay 'a'apolon naehaen ay so mwai' inaray kinololan.
S.PHON: aj ʔaʔapolon næhæn aj s~θo mwaiʔ inaraj kinololan.
S.FORM: ay 'a'apolon naehaen ay so mwai' inaray kinololan.
S.PHON: aj ʔaʔapolon næhæn aj s~θo mwaiʔ inaraj kinololan.

TRANSL.notes: 「如果從墓地回來,還要再分(帶回家的食物)嗎?」

S.TRANSL: 「如果從墓地回來,還要再分 嗎?」
"From the graveyard, are the food taken home still going to be distributed?"

S.FORM: ma rihaw ray kinkinololan hihiwaeen hihiwaeen.
S.PHON: ma rihaw raj kinkinololan hihiwæən hihiwæən.
S.FORM: ma rihaw ray kinkinololan hihiwaeen hihiwaeen.
S.PHON: ma rihaw raj kinkinololan hihiwæən hihiwæən.
S.TRANSL: 「在墓園那裡切成一塊一塊的.」

S.FORM: a XXXX o 'a'ap pa'a'apol a risao ka 'ima raroton risa.
S.PHON: a **** o ʔaʔap paʔaʔapol a ris~θao ka ʔima raroton ris~θa.
S.FORM: a XXXX o 'a'ap pa'a'apol a risao ka 'ima raroton risa.
S.PHON: a **** o ʔaʔap paʔaʔapol a ris~θao ka ʔima raroton ris~θa.
S.TRANSL: "Then they are distributed to the people gathered there."

S.FORM: nakhini 'am patabir ma isaa hini ray asang ma' rima' ka saboeh ka korkoring tatini' matna'amet ila isaa o.
S.PHON: nakhini ʔam pataβir ma is~θaa hini raj as~θaŋ maʔ rimaʔ ka s~θaβœh ka korkoriŋ tatiniʔ matnaʔamət ila is~θaa o.
S.FORM: nakhini 'am patabir ma isaa hini ray asang ma' rima' ka saboeh ka korkoring tatini' matna'amet ila isaa o.
S.PHON: nakhini ʔam pataβir ma is~θaa hini raj as~θaŋ maʔ rimaʔ ka s~θaβœh ka korkoriŋ tatiniʔ matnaʔamət ila is~θaa o.
S.TRANSL: "In rituals like this, everybody in the neighborhood goes."

S.FORM: uN So sizaeh ila 'ita' makakpeh mwai' ray taew'an ila hiza.
S.PHON: *n ʃo s~θiz~ðæh ila ʔitaʔ makakpəh mwaiʔ raj tæwʔan ila hiz~ða.
S.FORM: uN So sizaeh ila 'ita' makakpeh mwai' ray taew'an ila hiza.
S.PHON: *n ʃo s~θiz~ðæh ila ʔitaʔ makakpəh mwaiʔ raj tæwʔan ila hiz~ða.
S.TRANSL: 「如果拜完了,我們就各自回家.」
"Once we finish, we separate ways and go home."

S.FORM: So mwai' hiza lasia in inay kam rawas hiya' kosa a komsi'ael ma' isaa mak'aehae' a kanman.
S.PHON: ʃo mwaiʔ hiz~ða las~θia in inaj kam rawas~θ hijaʔ kos~θa a koms~θiʔæl maʔ is~θaa makʔæhæʔ a kanman.
S.FORM: So mwai' hiza lasia in inay kam rawas hiya' kosa a komsi'ael ma' isaa mak'aehae' a kanman.
S.PHON: ʃo mwaiʔ hiz~ða las~θia in inaj kam rawas~θ hijaʔ kos~θa a koms~θiʔæl maʔ is~θaa makʔæhæʔ a kanman.
S.TRANSL: 「從遠地來的人,如果有人要吃中飯,有時候可以去我那邊.」

TRANSL.notes: "If somebody wants to have lunch, they sometimes (come) to my house."

S.TRANSL: "If somebody wants to have lunch, they sometimes to my house."

S.FORM: ila hiza kala mini' isaa ila hiza kala kalih a taaw.
S.PHON: ila hiz~ða kala miniʔ is~θaa ila hiz~ða kala kalih a taaw.
S.FORM: ila hiza kala mini' isaa ila hiza kala kalih a taaw.
S.PHON: ila hiz~ða kala miniʔ is~θaa ila hiz~ða kala kalih a taaw.
S.TRANSL: "They either come to Mini's house or to Kalih-a-taaw's house."

S.FORM: pa'pa'apolon naehaen so hiya 'am kala hiya' 'am komsi'ael ma' isaa kita' ila lasia nonak.
S.PHON: paʔpaʔapolon næhæn s~θo hija ʔam kala hijaʔ ʔam koms~θiʔæl maʔ is~θaa kitaʔ ila las~θia nonak.
S.FORM: pa'pa'apolon naehaen so hiya 'am kala hiya' 'am komsi'ael ma' isaa kita' ila lasia nonak.
S.PHON: paʔpaʔapolon næhæn s~θo hija ʔam kala hijaʔ ʔam koms~θiʔæl maʔ is~θaa kitaʔ ila las~θia nonak.
S.TRANSL: 「他們自己決定要在誰那裡吃午餐.」
"They themselves decide where to have lunch."

S.FORM: 'am paspaso sinraehoe ila o.
S.PHON: ʔam pas~θpas~θo s~θinræhœ ila o.
S.FORM: 'am paspaso sinraehoe ila o.
S.PHON: ʔam pas~θpas~θo s~θinræhœ ila o.

S.FORM: ma' e nasia babai' ehe babai' ma' isaa kalababai' nonak ma ksi'ael risa.
S.PHON: maʔ ə nas~θia βaβaiʔ əhə βaβaiʔ maʔ is~θaa kalaβaβaiʔ nonak ma ks~θiʔæl ris~θa.
S.FORM: ma' e nasia babai' ehe babai' ma' isaa kalababai' nonak ma ksi'ael risa.
S.PHON: maʔ ə nas~θia βaβaiʔ əhə βaβaiʔ maʔ is~θaa kalaβaβaiʔ nonak ma ks~θiʔæl ris~θa.
S.TRANSL: "The Fengs have their lunch at the Feng homes."

S.FORM: niyam niya'om So isa inaray kinkinololan mwai' isa kaspinatabir 'arasen.
S.PHON: nijam nijaʔom ʃo is~θa inaraj kinkinololan mwaiʔ is~θa kas~θpinataβir ʔaras~θən.
S.FORM: niyam niya'om So isa inaray kinkinololan mwai' isa kaspinatabir 'arasen.
S.PHON: nijam nijaʔom ʃo is~θa inaraj kinkinololan mwaiʔ is~θa kas~θpinataβir ʔaras~θən.

S.FORM: nihiya' 'akoy titi'an.
S.PHON: nihijaʔ ʔakoj titiʔan.
S.FORM: nihiya' 'akoy titi'an.
S.PHON: nihijaʔ ʔakoj titiʔan.

TRANSL.notes: 「誰(拿到)的多一點.」

S.FORM: siroton saboeh hihiwa'en ila si'ael ila.
S.PHON: s~θiroton s~θaβœh hihiwaʔən ila s~θiʔæl ila.
S.FORM: siroton saboeh hihiwa'en ila si'ael ila.
S.PHON: s~θiroton s~θaβœh hihiwaʔən ila s~θiʔæl ila.
S.TRANSL: 「所有的祭品全部集合一起,切一切來吃.」
"All the offerings are gathered together, sliced and eaten."

S.FORM: m isaa kamoenhael isaa 'aewhaey.
S.PHON: m is~θaa kamœnhæl is~θaa ʔæwhæj.
S.FORM: m isaa kamoenhael isaa 'aewhaey.
S.PHON: m is~θaa kamœnhæl is~θaa ʔæwhæj.

S.FORM: XXXX 'i'ini' kosa si'ael ila potoy ila paphahai potoy ila a ato.
S.PHON: **** ʔiʔiniʔ kos~θa s~θiʔæl ila potoj ila paphahai potoj ila a ato.
S.FORM: XXXX 'i'ini' kosa si'ael ila potoy ila paphahai potoy ila a ato.
S.PHON: **** ʔiʔiniʔ kos~θa s~θiʔæl ila potoj ila paphahai potoj ila a ato.
S.TRANSL: 「還沒開始吃之前,有人已經在搶著打包他們要吃的了.」
"Before the meal even started, people were already packing food for themselves."

S.FORM: m aroma' 'am si'ael ila ka tatini' 'am ima raroton o.
S.PHON: m aromaʔ ʔam s~θiʔæl ila ka tatiniʔ ʔam ima raroton o.
S.FORM: m aroma' 'am si'ael ila ka tatini' 'am ima raroton o.
S.PHON: m aromaʔ ʔam s~θiʔæl ila ka tatiniʔ ʔam ima raroton o.

TRANSL.notes: 「當其他人在吃的時候,(為了大家的聚會)老人還在收.」

S.TRANSL: 「當其他人在吃的時候, 老人還在收.」
"The elders were still gathered for meeting when people started eating."

S.FORM: uh isaa asi'ael ila o kitaen 'oka' ila.
S.PHON: *h is~θaa as~θiʔæl ila o kitæn ʔokaʔ ila.
S.FORM: uh isaa asi'ael ila o kitaen 'oka' ila.
S.PHON: *h is~θaa as~θiʔæl ila o kitæn ʔokaʔ ila.

TRANSL.notes: 「(等到聚會已經結束,老人)他們準備要吃,所有吃的東西都沒了.」

S.TRANSL: 「 他們準備要吃,所有吃的東西都沒了.」

TRANSL.notes: "(After the meeting was over and) they were ready to eat, all the food was gone."

S.TRANSL: " they were ready to eat, all the food was gone."

S.FORM: potoyon ila.
S.PHON: potojon ila.
S.FORM: potoyon ila.
S.PHON: potojon ila.

TRANSL.notes: 「(吃的東西都)打包好了.」
"(The food were already) packed."

S.FORM: kamoenhal isaa nakisaa 'aewhaey.
S.PHON: kamœnhal is~θaa nakis~θaa ʔæwhæj.
S.FORM: kamoenhal isaa nakisaa 'aewhaey.
S.PHON: kamœnhal is~θaa nakis~θaa ʔæwhæj.

S.FORM: isahini kaysa'an 'am manabih lasia.
S.PHON: is~θahini kajs~θaʔan ʔam manaβih las~θia.
S.FORM: isahini kaysa'an 'am manabih lasia.
S.PHON: is~θahini kajs~θaʔan ʔam manaβih las~θia.

TRANSL.notes: "They were already told ( ... ) this year."

S.FORM: 'am kayzaeh ila koSa.
S.PHON: ʔam kajz~ðæh ila koʃa.
S.FORM: 'am kayzaeh ila koSa.
S.PHON: ʔam kajz~ðæh ila koʃa.

S.FORM: uh 'izi' 'izi' potoy.
S.PHON: *h ʔiz~ðiʔ ʔiz~ðiʔ potoj.
S.FORM: uh 'izi' 'izi' potoy.
S.PHON: *h ʔiz~ðiʔ ʔiz~ðiʔ potoj.

TRANSL.notes: 「(大家還沒吃之前)不打包.」
"Don't pack (before everybody has eaten)."

S.FORM: XXXX uN si'ael naehaen o So kayni' ila isaa.
S.PHON: **** *n s~θiʔæl næhæn o ʃo kajniʔ ila is~θaa.
S.FORM: XXXX uN si'ael naehaen o So kayni' ila isaa.
S.PHON: **** *n s~θiʔæl næhæn o ʃo kajniʔ ila is~θaa.

TRANSL.notes: 「先吃,如果還有剩下的(lit.別人不要的),」
"Eat first, then if there are any leftovers (that nobody wants),"

S.TRANSL: "Eat first, then if there are any leftovers ,"

S.FORM: uN a nonak ila.
S.PHON: *n a nonak ila.
S.FORM: uN a nonak ila.
S.PHON: *n a nonak ila.

S.FORM: aras aroma' 'aewhaey 'izik kosa 'a 'a'apol So nihiya 'am koSa mari' ila.
S.PHON: aras~θ aromaʔ ʔæwhæj ʔiz~ðik kos~θa ʔa ʔaʔapol ʃo nihija ʔam koʃa mariʔ ila.
S.FORM: aras aroma' 'aewhaey 'izik kosa 'a 'a'apol So nihiya 'am koSa mari' ila.
S.PHON: aras~θ aromaʔ ʔæwhæj ʔiz~ðik kos~θa ʔa ʔaʔapol ʃo nihija ʔam koʃa mariʔ ila.
S.TRANSL: 「別提怎麼分配食物,那是不能說的,如果你想要帶回家,直接做就好了」
"Don't mention about distributing the food. That's taboo. If say you want to bring home food, then you go ahead."

S.FORM: kaysa'an nakhara.
S.PHON: kajs~θaʔan nakhara.
S.FORM: kaysa'an nakhara.
S.PHON: kajs~θaʔan nakhara.

S.FORM: eN baza'en raamen 'am.
S.PHON: ən βaz~ðaʔən raamən ʔam.
S.FORM: eN baza'en raamen 'am.
S.PHON: ən βaz~ðaʔən raamən ʔam.

TRANSL.notes: "They listened and perhaps (the situation) improved."

S.FORM: eN niya'om isaa hiza talo sasaboehen noka aniyami'a inoka titiyon no ma isa yami nonak hiwa' ka 'aeyam tinawbon.
S.PHON: ən nijaʔom is~θaa hiz~ða talo s~θas~θaβœhən noka anijamiʔa inoka titijon no ma is~θa jami nonak hiwaʔ ka ʔæjam tinawβon.
S.FORM: eN niya'om isaa hiza talo sasaboehen noka aniyami'a inoka titiyon no ma isa yami nonak hiwa' ka 'aeyam tinawbon.
S.PHON: ən nijaʔom is~θaa hiz~ða talo s~θas~θaβœhən noka anijamiʔa inoka titijon no ma is~θa jami nonak hiwaʔ ka ʔæjam tinawβon.

TRANSL.notes: 「我們切我們(要)的豬肉和糯米糕.」

S.TRANSL: 「我們切我們 的豬肉和糯米糕.」
"We slice our own meat and rice-cakes."

S.FORM: 'a'apol ma' isaa 'a'apol ma' ta 'a'apol ma' isaa pa'apol ka saboeh ila hiza sipaysiri ila hiza ray sinrahoe.
S.PHON: ʔaʔapol maʔ is~θaa ʔaʔapol maʔ ta ʔaʔapol maʔ is~θaa paʔapol ka s~θaβœh ila hiz~ða s~θipajs~θiri ila hiz~ða raj s~θinrahœ.
S.FORM: 'a'apol ma' isaa 'a'apol ma' ta 'a'apol ma' isaa pa'apol ka saboeh ila hiza sipaysiri ila hiza ray sinrahoe.
S.PHON: ʔaʔapol maʔ is~θaa ʔaʔapol maʔ ta ʔaʔapol maʔ is~θaa paʔapol ka s~θaβœh ila hiz~ða s~θipajs~θiri ila hiz~ða raj s~θinrahœ.
S.TRANSL: "We distribute them to all the clans."

S.FORM: a e babai' sayna'ase titiyon karkarang sepat sinraehoe na a so'o 'anahiya ma' isaa ko'ngin rima' ma papsibai' ila hiza ila sizaeh ray sasinsinraehoe'.
S.PHON: a ə βaβaiʔ s~θajnaʔas~θə titijon karkaraŋ s~θəpat s~θinræhœ na a s~θoʔo ʔanahija maʔ is~θaa koʔŋin rimaʔ ma paps~θiβaiʔ ila hiz~ða ila s~θiz~ðæh raj s~θas~θins~θinræhœʔ.
S.FORM: a e babai' sayna'ase titiyon karkarang sepat sinraehoe na a so'o 'anahiya ma' isaa ko'ngin rima' ma papsibai' ila hiza ila sizaeh ray sasinsinraehoe'.
S.PHON: a ə βaβaiʔ s~θajnaʔas~θə titijon karkaraŋ s~θəpat s~θinræhœ na a s~θoʔo ʔanahija maʔ is~θaa koʔŋin rimaʔ ma paps~θiβaiʔ ila hiz~ða ila s~θiz~ðæh raj s~θas~θins~θinræhœʔ.
S.TRANSL: 「我們分食物給所有的姓的人.」

TRANSL.notes: "We distribute (the food) to all the clans."

S.FORM: pa'apol ila so'o sizaeh ila ma'apol hiza isaa hiza may isa makakpoeh ila so ina si'ael ila sil'amet ka kaspinatabir ka pinobaeaeh 'oyae may isa ila 'ameten riza lobih ila ray taew'an ka ka kasi'aelen ka 'aeyam walo' hara soya' XXXX tinawbon soya' ma 'okay 'ameti ila as iska nonak ila arasen ray taew'an.
S.PHON: paʔapol ila s~θoʔo s~θiz~ðæh ila maʔapol hiz~ða is~θaa hiz~ða maj is~θa makakpœh ila s~θo ina s~θiʔæl ila s~θilʔamət ka kas~θpinataβir ka pinoβææh ʔojæ maj is~θa ila ʔamətən riz~ða loβih ila raj tæwʔan ka ka kas~θiʔælən ka ʔæjam waloʔ hara s~θojaʔ **** tinawβon s~θojaʔ ma ʔokaj ʔaməti ila as~θ is~θka nonak ila aras~θən raj tæwʔan.
S.FORM: pa'apol ila so'o sizaeh ila ma'apol hiza isaa hiza may isa makakpoeh ila so ina si'ael ila sil'amet ka kaspinatabir ka pinobaeaeh 'oyae may isa ila 'ameten riza lobih ila ray taew'an ka ka kasi'aelen ka 'aeyam walo' hara soya' XXXX tinawbon soya' ma 'okay 'ameti ila as iska nonak ila arasen ray taew'an.
S.PHON: paʔapol ila s~θoʔo s~θiz~ðæh ila maʔapol hiz~ða is~θaa hiz~ða maj is~θa makakpœh ila s~θo ina s~θiʔæl ila s~θilʔamət ka kas~θpinataβir ka pinoβææh ʔojæ maj is~θa ila ʔamətən riz~ða loβih ila raj tæwʔan ka ka kas~θiʔælən ka ʔæjam waloʔ hara s~θojaʔ **** tinawβon s~θojaʔ ma ʔokaj ʔaməti ila as~θ is~θka nonak ila aras~θən raj tæwʔan.
S.TRANSL: 「各人各自把剩下的米糕帶回家.」
"People just take the leftover rice-cakes home themselves."

S.FORM: ya mina isaso.
S.PHON: ja mina is~θas~θo.
S.FORM: ya mina isaso.
S.PHON: ja mina is~θas~θo.

S.FORM: XXXX hiza m aroma so 'oka' o hara a'.
S.PHON: **** hiz~ða m aroma s~θo ʔokaʔ o hara aʔ.
S.FORM: XXXX hiza m aroma so 'oka' o hara a'.
S.PHON: **** hiz~ða m aroma s~θo ʔokaʔ o hara aʔ.

S.FORM: aroma' o a tataa' 'aeyam nanaw isaa ma' kayzaeh siyamez ila kayzaeh siamez ila kayzaeh.
S.PHON: aromaʔ o a tataaʔ ʔæjam nanaw is~θaa maʔ kajz~ðæh s~θijaməz~ð ila kajz~ðæh s~θiaməz~ð ila kajz~ðæh.
S.FORM: aroma' o a tataa' 'aeyam nanaw isaa ma' kayzaeh siyamez ila kayzaeh siamez ila kayzaeh.
S.PHON: aromaʔ o a tataaʔ ʔæjam nanaw is~θaa maʔ kajz~ðæh s~θijaməz~ð ila kajz~ðæh s~θiaməz~ð ila kajz~ðæh.
S.TRANSL: 「雞肉和豬肉可以混合在一起.」
"It's good to mix the chicken and pork together."

S.FORM: m e si'ael ma' si'ael ila saboeh.
S.PHON: m ə s~θiʔæl maʔ s~θiʔæl ila s~θaβœh.
S.FORM: m e si'ael ma' si'ael ila saboeh.
S.PHON: m ə s~θiʔæl maʔ s~θiʔæl ila s~θaβœh.

S.FORM: kakhayza'an 'okik haebae'aen mae'iyaeh kayzaeh.
S.PHON: kakhajz~ðaʔan ʔokik hæβæʔæn mæʔijæh kajz~ðæh.
S.FORM: kakhayza'an 'okik haebae'aen mae'iyaeh kayzaeh.
S.PHON: kakhajz~ðaʔan ʔokik hæβæʔæn mæʔijæh kajz~ðæh.
S.TRANSL: "There were not many people before, which is good."

S.FORM: so patabir o mwai' o ray raan ray kapsiwazayan isaa o masmasaeng.
S.PHON: s~θo pataβir o mwaiʔ o raj raan raj kaps~θiwaz~ðajan is~θaa o mas~θmas~θæŋ.
S.FORM: so patabir o mwai' o ray raan ray kapsiwazayan isaa o masmasaeng.
S.PHON: s~θo pataβir o mwaiʔ o raj raan raj kaps~θiwaz~ðajan is~θaa o mas~θmas~θæŋ.

TRANSL.notes: 「如果來拜拜(拜好之後)在交叉路口休息.」

S.TRANSL: 「如果來拜拜 在交叉路口休息.」
"At tomb-sweeping, everybody gets down below the cemetery to sit down."

S.FORM: m si'aelen kayzaeh kik 'akoy ayrai' o.
S.PHON: m s~θiʔælən kajz~ðæh kik ʔakoj ajraiʔ o.
S.FORM: m si'aelen kayzaeh kik 'akoy ayrai' o.
S.PHON: m s~θiʔælən kajz~ðæh kik ʔakoj ajraiʔ o.
S.TRANSL: "Good to eat. Not much food. They're placed on the ground."

S.FORM: eN masmasaeng isaa si'aelen rae'oe mil'amet.
S.PHON: ən mas~θmas~θæŋ is~θaa s~θiʔælən ræʔœ milʔamət.
S.FORM: eN masmasaeng isaa si'aelen rae'oe mil'amet.
S.PHON: ən mas~θmas~θæŋ is~θaa s~θiʔælən ræʔœ milʔamət.
S.TRANSL: 「把東西擺在地上, 坐著就吃了, 乾杯.」
"put things on the ground, then sit down and eat and drink"

S.FORM: ah haysani 'oka'o so roemae'oe mil'akoy kakhayza'an ma' pinobaeaeh 'okik 'akoy a.
S.PHON: ah hajs~θani ʔokaʔo s~θo rœmæʔœ milʔakoj kakhajz~ðaʔan maʔ pinoβææh ʔokik ʔakoj a.
S.FORM: ah haysani 'oka'o so roemae'oe mil'akoy kakhayza'an ma' pinobaeaeh 'okik 'akoy a.
S.PHON: ah hajs~θani ʔokaʔo s~θo rœmæʔœ milʔakoj kakhajz~ðaʔan maʔ pinoβææh ʔokik ʔakoj a.
S.TRANSL: 「現在不一樣了, 如果一喝酒就喝多. 以前酒也不多.」
"It's not the same nowadays. Once you start to drink, you tend to drink too much. There was not much wine in those days."

S.FORM: a binbinisitan rima' sisapih mwai' raerae'oe eh.
S.PHON: a βinβinis~θitan rimaʔ s~θis~θapih mwaiʔ ræræʔœ əh.
S.FORM: a binbinisitan rima' sisapih mwai' raerae'oe eh.
S.PHON: a βinβinis~θitan rimaʔ s~θis~θapih mwaiʔ ræræʔœ əh.
S.TRANSL: "People used to take bottles in exchange for wine to drink."
